title: Ear Plug Dispenser
shortDescription: Disposable ear plug dispenser that can be placed on a surface or wall-mounted. Makes hearing protection easily accessible to staff & visitors. Holds 500 pairs of DRO30 disposable foam ear plugs and includes a polybag of 500 pairs of ear plug refills.
description: Disposable ear plug dispenser that can be placed on a surface or wall-mounted. Makes hearing protection easily accessible to staff & visitors. Holds 500 pairs of DRO30 disposable foam ear plugs and includes a polybag of 500 pairs of ear plug refills.
